glosses.vi: của anh ấy; của cô ấy
glosses.ja: 彼のもの; 彼女のもの

translations.vi: Cái sạc đó là của người ấy.
translations.el: Αυτός ο φορτιστής είναι δικός του.
translations.ja: その充電器は彼のです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying the noun 'chargeur' (masculine singular).
Head noun of the noun phrase; masculine singular.
Clitic demonstrative pronoun elided before a vowel; subject of the copula.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject 'c'' to the predicate nominal.
Definite article introducing the possessive pronoun phrase 'le sien'; marks gender/number of the possessed item.
Possessive pronoun referring to a masculine singular item belonging to a third person; predicate nominal complement of 'est'.

sentences.target: On a pris la sienne par erreur.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a pʁi la sjɛn paʁ eʁœʁ/

translations.fr: On a pris la sienne par erreur.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a pʁi la sjɛn paʁ eʁœʁ/
translations.de: Wir haben aus Versehen ihres genommen.
translations.it: Abbiamo preso la sua per sbaglio.
translations.yue: 我哋唔覺意拎錯咗佢嗰個。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi lỡ lấy nhầm của cô ấy.
translations.ar: أخذنا الذي لها عن طريق الخطأ.
translations.nl: We hebben per ongeluk de hare gepakt.
translations.hi: हमने गलती से उसकी चीज़ ले ली.
translations.el: Πήραμε κατά λάθος το δικό της.
translations.nb: Vi tok hennes ved et uhell.
translations.ro: Am luat din greșeală al ei.
translations.da: Vi tog hendes ved en fejl.
translations.ja: 私たちは間違えて彼女のを取ってしまいました。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Auxiliary 'avoir' forming the perfect (passé composé) with the past participle 'pris'.
Past participle of the main verb; completes the compound tense 'a pris'.
Definite article selecting the possessive pronoun 'sienne' to form the noun phrase 'la sienne'.
Possessive pronoun referring to a feminine singular item; direct object of 'a pris'.
Preposition introducing the adverbial phrase 'par erreur'.
Noun complement to the preposition 'par'; forms a manner adverbial ('by mistake').

sentences.target: Je garde les siens dans cette boîte.
sentences.reading: /ʒə gaʁd le sjɛ̃ dɑ̃ sɛt bwat/

translations.fr: Je garde les siens dans cette boîte.
translations.ipa: /ʒə gaʁd le sjɛ̃ dɑ̃ sɛt bwat/
translations.en: I keep his/hers in this box.
translations.es: Guardo los suyos en esta caja.
translations.de: Ich bewahre seine in dieser Schachtel auf.
translations.it: Tengo i suoi in questa scatola.
translations.ko: 저는 그의 것들을 이 상자에 보관해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把他的放在这个盒子里。
translations.yue: 我將佢嗰啲擺喺呢個盒度。
translations.ru: Я храню его вещи в этой коробке.
translations.pt: Eu guardo os dele nesta caixa.
translations.he: אני שומר את שלו בקופסה הזאת.
translations.vi: Tôi cất đồ của người ấy vào chiếc hộp này.
translations.nl: Ik bewaar de zijne in deze doos.
translations.uk: Я зберігаю його речі в цій коробці.
translations.hu: Az övéit ebben a dobozban tartom.
translations.hi: मैं उसका सामान इस डिब्बे में रखता हूँ.
translations.pl: Trzymam jego rzeczy w tym pudełku.
translations.el: Κρατάω τα δικά του σε αυτό το κουτί.
translations.nb: Jeg oppbevarer hans ting i denne boksen.
translations.id: Saya menyimpan miliknya di kotak ini.
translations.sv: Jag förvarar hans saker i den här lådan.
translations.ro: Țin ale lui în cutia asta.
translations.cs: Jeho věci mám v této krabici.
translations.da: Jeg opbevarer hans ting i denne æske.
translations.ja: 私は彼のものをこの箱に保管しています。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb in the present (1st person singular); governs the object 'les siens'.
Plural definite article introducing the possessive pronoun 'siens'.
Possessive pronoun referring to masculine plural items; direct object of 'garde'.
Preposition introducing the locative prepositional phrase.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'boîte' (feminine singular).
Head noun of the prepositional phrase 'dans cette boîte'; indicates location.

sentences.target: Tu prends la sienne ou la tienne.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɑ̃ la sjɛn u la tjɛn/

translations.fr: Tu prends la sienne ou la tienne.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɑ̃ la sjɛn u la tjɛn/
translations.en: Are you taking hers or yours?
translations.es: ¿Vas a llevar la suya o la tuya?
translations.it: Prendi la sua o la tua?
translations.ko: 너는 그녀 거를 가져갈래, 아니면 네 거를 가져갈래?
translations.yue: 你攞佢嗰個定係你嗰個？
translations.pt: Você vai levar a dela ou a sua?
translations.he: אתה לוקח את שלה או את שלך?
translations.tr: Onunkini mi alıyorsun yoksa kendininkini mi?
translations.vi: Bạn lấy đồ của cô ấy hay của bạn?
translations.ar: هل ستأخذ الذي لها أم الذي لك؟
translations.nl: Neem je die van haar of die van jezelf?
translations.hu: Az övét viszed vagy a sajátodat?
translations.el: Παίρνεις τη δική της ή τη δική σου?
translations.ro: Iei a ei sau a ta?
translations.ja: 彼女のを取りますか、それとも自分のを取りますか？

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb in the present (2nd person singular); selects direct objects.
Definite article introducing the possessive pronoun 'sienne'.
Possessive pronoun; feminine singular direct object of 'prends'.
Coordinating conjunction presenting an alternative between two noun phrases.
Definite article introducing the possessive pronoun 'tienne'.
Second-person singular possessive pronoun; feminine singular direct object alternative.
